factors.summary: Demand trends are decelerating, particularly in key product lines.

evidence.text: The IPS organic sales decrease of 8.4 percent was driven primarily by weaker systems demand in polymer processing and industrial coatings product lines, which was partially offset by growth in systems and parts demand for adhesive product lines. The MFS organic sales decrease of 11.2 percent was driven by lower demand and tough year-over-year comparisons in medical interventional solutions product lines, where customer destocking trends continued to impact demand.

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Demand trends are decelerating in key product lines, indicating a moderate headwind.
